title: Whole Codebase Final Dry
findings: Scanned 496 scoped files after reading ISS-20260609-001..068. Found one distinct root cause: cite-coverage per-layer type i18n uses singular keys in CLI/tests while schema/locales define plural KnowledgeType keys, so output can render raw key strings and tests bless the fallback.
issues_found: [{"title":"Cite coverage per-layer type labels use singular i18n keys against plural schema/locales","severity":"medium","evidence":["packages/shared/src/schemas/api-contracts.ts:1236-1240 says per_layer_type inner keys are plural KnowledgeType values","packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts:216-221 defines only cite-coverage.contract.type.decisions/pitfalls/models/guidelines/processes/unresolved","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts:1178 and 1279-1283 constructs cite-coverage.contract.type.${key} while comments/tests expect singular decision/pitfall","packages/cli/__tests__/integration/doctor-cite-coverage.test.ts:475-476 asserts t(\"cite-coverage.contract.type.decision\")/pitfall, which are missing keys and therefore protects raw-key fallback"],"root_cause":"CLI formatter/test contract drifted to singular type keys, but shared report schema and locale catalogs use plural KnowledgeType literals."}]
